name: n54-audio-deck
description: N54 Audio Deck: локальный Android-аудиоплеер с каноническим web-источником и immutable dist-сборкой

scripts.capacitor:sync:before: npm run build:web && node scripts/android-toolchain.mjs && node scripts/extra-native.mjs && node scripts/version-android.mjs && node scripts/media3-private-pilot-v2.mjs
scripts.add:android: npm run model && npm run build:web && cap add android && capacitor-assets generate --android && node scripts/patch-android-v2.mjs && cap sync android
scripts.sync: npm run model && npm run build:web && node scripts/patch-android-v2.mjs && cap sync android
scripts.serve: npm run build:web && npx --yes serve dist -l 5173
scripts.check:source: node scripts/check-app.mjs && node scripts/media3-stage3-check.mjs && node scripts/media3-stage3-behavior.mjs
scripts.check: npm run check:source && npm run test:behavior && npm run build:web
